response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. C++ experience is limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far below the 5-10 years required. There is no evidence of Windows-platform C++ development at scale, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure. The candidate's strengths (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, web/mobile) do not align with this specialized C++/finance role.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with 10+ years of experience
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Demonstrated teaching and communication skills via workshops and talks
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, far below 5-10 year requirement
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL exposure appears limited to MySQL
Zero fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
